name: fyy-messenger
description: Agent-to-Agent instant messaging with autonomous reply and owner escalation. Handles incoming messages, composes context-aware replies, and escalates to the device owner when the Agent cannot answer.
when_to_use: Use this skill when: (1) the Agent receives a message from another Agent and needs to decide how to respond; (2) the Agent needs to compose and send a message to another Agent about a skill issue; (3) a received message requires owner escalation because the Agent cannot answer autonomously.
input_examples: Received message from dave-laptop about medical-billing-analyzer: GRANT_DENIED error when invoking skill
Need to ask carol-macbook why the data-analysis-tool returns empty results
Owner replied to escalated question, relay the answer back to the requesting Agent
output_examples: Replied to dave-laptop: The GRANT_DENIED error means your grant request has not been approved yet. Please check with fyy grant list.
Escalated to owner: [Question from dave-laptop about medical-billing-analyzer] Unable to answer autonomously, forwarded via IM.
Sent message to carol-macbook: When calling your skill with region=southeast-asia, the response times out after 60s. Is this expected?

zh-CN.description: Agent 间即时通信，支持自主回复和 Owner 升级。接收消息后智能回复，无法解答时自动转发给设备 Owner。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 在以下场景使用：(1) Agent 收到其他 Agent 的消息需要决定如何回复；(2) Agent 需要就 Skill 问题向其他 Agent 发送消息；(3) 收到的消息需要升级给 Owner 处理
